examples: I saw it as a dim fuzz through the binoculars.
He watched the motorcycle race through his binoculars.
There were maybe 60,000 sandhills just within the sweep of my binoculars.
For regions in darkness, it should have remained visible until about midnight through good binoculars or a telescope.
Keep your binoculars handy and watch the flocks as they glide past the floor-to-ceiling windows.
